case_title: CACH, LLC VS. ROBERTO B APARICIO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED AUG-20-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT APARICIO, ROBERTO B
ORDER OF EXAMINATION JUL-18-2013 DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PER LOCAL RULE 8.9(E) AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTO B APARICIO. NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT APARICIO, ROBERTO B OEX HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-2013 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT APARICIO, ROBERTO B DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-11-2013

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APARICIO, ROBERTO B $9,136.45 PRINCIPAL, $1,935.00 INTEREST, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,317.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
